name: atum-agency-workflows
description: ATUM SAS — AI development agency plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: atum-core
plugins.description: ATUM agency identity, project management, dashboard sync. Always installed for agency work.

plugins.name: atum-compliance
plugins.description: EU AI Act and RGPD compliance with ATUM Audit MCP integration. Use for compliance audits, system registration, Annex IV documentation.

plugins.name: atum-security
plugins.description: Security expert agents for code audits, vulnerability detection, and security hardening.

plugins.name: atum-architecture
plugins.description: Architecture review, API design, database optimization, and critical thinking for system design decisions.

plugins.name: atum-python
plugins.description: Python, FastAPI, and Django development with TDD workflow, async patterns, and uv packaging.

plugins.name: atum-typescript
plugins.description: TypeScript, Next.js, and React Native development with modern tooling and patterns.

plugins.name: atum-devops
plugins.description: DevOps, deployment on Railway/Cloudflare/Vercel, Docker patterns, and infrastructure automation.

plugins.name: atum-data-ai
plugins.description: Data engineering with Airflow/Spark, ML engineering, RAG patterns, and prompt engineering for AI products.

plugins.name: atum-mobile
plugins.description: Mobile development with Expo/React Native, Stripe integration, and Google Play Store publication.

plugins.name: atum-orchestration
plugins.description: Multi-agent workflows, autonomous routing (108 NLP triggers FR/EN), fresh-execute, and conductor workflow.

plugins.name: atum-docs
plugins.description: Documentation generation, Mermaid diagrams, PDF creation, and codebase pattern analysis.

plugins.name: atum-sales-marketing
plugins.description: Commercial workflows, WhatsApp integration, and sales tooling for ATUM agency operations.

plugins.name: atum-scheduler
plugins.description: Scheduled task management with cron patterns for health checks, security audits, and ATUM obligations.
